title: weDevs
summary: Wedevs interview questions, Wedevs interview stages, Wedevs interview details, Wedevs interview questions and answers
content: # weDevs | | | | :-| :- | | Founding year | 2008 | | Company Website | https://wedevs.com/ | | Career Website | https://wedevs.com/career/ | | Technologies Used| WordPress, PHP | ## Introduction [WeDevs](https://wedevs.com/) is an international software company. weDevs is the parent company of Dokan Multivendor, WP User Frontend, WP Project Manager, WP ERP, weMail, FlyWP, and six more exclusive WordPress products. At weDevs, they are dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what is possible with WordPress and SaaS solutions. ## Interview Stages weDevs' fresher recruitment is currently based on competitive programming. They post job circulars on their career page and LinkedIn page. The circulars often ask for a good national rank or a Codeforces rating of 1600+ (you can apply if you are slightly below this). Their interview process consists of three stages. The first two stages vary from person to person. For some, the first stage is a basic verbal session focusing on fundamental computer science concepts, while for others, it is a coding round. The final stage is called the HR round. To receive an offer, you must pass all three stages. ## Questions ### Interview Question Discuss BFS and DFS: which one is faster, and what are their use cases? ### Interview Question Explain the principles of OOP. ### Interview Question How many types of relationships exist in databases? ### Interview Question What is binary search? How does it work? ### Interview Question Questions may be asked about the projects you have mentioned. ### Interview Question The coding round is conducted on vjudge and contains Codeforces problems. The complexity is around 1000-1600 ELO rating.
